Figure 8:Hessian bound (Corollary8.2) on MNIST (left) and CIFAR-10 (right). Each network hasN=128N=128neurons; inputs are PCA-projected tod=50d=50(MNIST) andd=64d=64(CIFAR-10). Measured spectral norm‚Äñ‚àáx2f‚Äñ2\|\nabla^{2}_{x}f\|_{2}(diamonds) and theoretical bound‚ÄñW‚Äñ2,‚àû2/Œµ\|W\|_{2,\infty}^{2}/\varepsilon(dashed squares) on 300 random test images. The bound is never violated across allŒµ‚àà{0.1,0.3,1.0,3.0,10.0}\varepsilon\in\{0.1,0.3,1.0,3.0,10.0\}on both datasets. Note that PCA projection constitutes a significant dimensionality reduction from raw pixels; verification on raw or learned representations remains open.
